sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n103387" key="tetrai/+zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τετραΐζω</orth>, <sense id="n103387.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">suffer from quartan fever</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cyran.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">45</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
